candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total because it is the cleaner reported revenue line.
Also matches top-line revenue, but appears to duplicate Revenue exactly in the preview, so it is a fallback only.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Interest income, not sales/revenue.
Net finance line, not revenue.
Tax line, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Bottom-line income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Non-recurring item, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using Revenue as primary top-line and Total Revenue as fallback priority label because both appear and are identical in preview.

candidates.why: Direct production/service cost line and the best match for cost of sales.
Inventory asset line on the balance sheet, not an expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line from the income statement.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A label exists, but preview is empty; per rules it should still be included when present.
Broad overhead bucket, but looks subtotal-like and inconsistent across years, so less preferred than components.
Clear overhead component and strong SG&A candidate.
Clear overhead component and strong SG&A candidate.
Explicit SG&A-related component for at least one year.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|double. Explicit SG&A row exists but is mostly empty in preview, so included it plus overhead component rows. Excluded Operating expenses because it appears broad/subtotal-like and may include non-SG&A items including direct costs.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Contains R&D wording, but it is only a depreciation subcomponent within R&D, not a dedicated R&D expense line.

variables.notes: No dedicated research and development expense line is visible. The only R&D-related row is a depreciation subcomponent, which should not be used as XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; usable if no more granular recurring interest line is available.
Most direct recurring interest expense line and preferred over broader finance expense.
Minority attribution line, not interest expense.
Minority attribution line, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Recurring interest-related item, but likely a subset of Interest Expenses and marked supplemental; using it with Interest Expenses risks double counting.
Equity line, not interest expense.
Equity line, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Preferred the granular recurring interest line. Excluded Finance expense because it is broader, and excluded lease-interest supplemental line to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance-sheet book equity.
Component of equity, not total book equity.
Does not represent total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match because it excludes non-controlling interests and represents parent shareholders' equity.
Usable fallback only if owner-attributable equity were unavailable; here it would risk overlap with MIB.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Selected owner-attributable equity to exclude non-controlling interests from BE.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution line, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Income statement profit attribution line, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; preferred.
Equivalent balance-sheet label and good fallback.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet NCI labels as priority list; these are the correct minority equity lines.
